items.claim: Mike Davis is faster, cleaner, and hits harder in the boxing department compared to Naru Ali.
items.quote: Mike Davis is faster, he's cleaner, he hits harder.

items.claim: Naru Ali struggled to take down Shemrock, indicating he may not be able to take down Mike Davis.
items.quote: I've watched Nurulo Ali not be able to take down Shemrock of all people. I don't think he's taken down Mike Davis

items.claim: Naru Ali's striking is still a work in progress with him missing punches and lacking significant power.
items.quote: Nuo Ali striking is still very much a work in progress. He still very much is whiffing on a lot of punches.

items.claim: Mike Davis has proven finishing power in his fights.
items.quote: Mike Davis can put some power on you. He really can.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is taking the fight on short notice.
items.quote: Cody Gibson actually taking this fight on short notice.

items.claim: Cody Gibson's long limbs pose grappling and length advantages that make him difficult to keep down.
items.quote: those long limbs can cause problems, pose issues potentially on the mat.
